mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth signals robust economic expansion, increasing corporate earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in periods of GDPC1 growth > 1.5% annualized are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in the federal funds rate above 3.5% signals tightening monetary policy, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods with FEDFUNDS > 3.5% are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) signal policy uncertainty, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods with CPIAUCSL > 0.5% MoM and FEDFUNDS > 3.0% are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or interaction effect size < 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: During high inflation regimes (CPIAUCSL > 2.5% YoY), rising federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS) amplify bond yield pressures, reducing equity risk appetite and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in CPIAUCSL > 2.5% YoY periods with FEDFUNDS increases are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or regime-specific IC < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 150k signals strong labor market demand, boosting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in PAYEMS > 150k periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 1-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) above 105 signals improving manufacturing activity, increasing corporate profits and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in INDPRO > 105 periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.04 over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) above 1,400k indicate elevated construction activity, boosting related sectors and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in HOUST > 1400k periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: High consumer spending (RSAFS) combined with low unemployment (UNRATE < 3.5%) indicates strong demand-side momentum, increasing corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in RSAFS > 680k and UNRATE < 3.5% periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or interaction effect size < 0.12.
